footer.tagline: The marketplace for collectors. Buy and sell rare, vintage and remarkable finds — safely.

home.heroTitle: Find the piece you've been hunting for.
home.heroSubtitle: Rare and vintage collectibles, listed by people who love them as much as you do.
home.empty: No items in this category yet.

trust.protectionBody: Your money is held safely until you confirm the item.
trust.feeBody: A simple 5% on each sale — no hidden charges.
trust.qualityBody: Every listing is reviewed before it goes live.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to manage your items and favourites.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your free account and start collecting today.
auth.registerError: Couldn't create the account. Check your details and try again.

article.notFoundBody: It may have been removed or is awaiting review.

sell.title: Sell an item
sell.subtitle: Your listing goes live once it passes our quick review.
sell.submittedBody: We'll publish your item as soon as it's approved.
sell.error: Couldn't submit the listing. Check your inputs and try again.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.successBody: Your order is confirmed. The seller has been notified.
checkout.error: Payment failed. Check your card details and try again.
checkout.simulated: This is a simulated payment — no real card is charged.
checkout.protectionNote: Includes Collector.shop buyer protection. A 5% fee is taken from the seller's payout.

profile.title: My profile
profile.name: Name
profile.readyToSellBody: Apply for a seller account to list your own items.
profile.editSubtitle: Update your details. Leave the password blank to keep it unchanged.
profile.updateError: Couldn't save your changes. Please review and try again.

interests.title: Your interests
interests.subtitle: Pick categories you love to get tailored recommendations.

orders.title: Transaction history
orders.subtitle: Track everything you've bought and sold.
orders.reviewError: Couldn't submit your review (maybe already reviewed).

favorites.title: Favourites
favorites.subtitle: Items you've saved for later.
favorites.empty: No favourites yet — tap the heart on any item to save it.

admin.categoriesSubtitle: Create, rename and remove the catalogue categories.
admin.createError: Couldn't create the category (name may already exist).
admin.noCategories: No categories yet. Create your first one above.
admin.pendingSubtitle: Approve, reject or remove submitted listings.
admin.sellersSubtitle: Ban sellers who break the charter, or lift a ban.
admin.confirmBan: Ban {{name}}? Their listings will be hidden.
